zh.Blithfield, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布利費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Blithfield於1330年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布利費爾德時，她的父親Richard de Blithfield37歲，母親Cecily33歲。她於大約1357年與Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布利費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年在她的家鄉享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Blithfield was born in 1330, in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Blithfield, was 37 and her mother, Cecily, was 33. She married Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield about 1357, in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1367, in her hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Blithfield est née en 1330, à Blithfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Blithfield, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecily, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield environ 1357, à Blithfield, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1367, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, England: Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Blithfield 1330 in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Blithfield 37 und ihre Mutter Cecily 33. Sie hat um 1357 in Blithfield, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1367 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield circa 1357, nel Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1367, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Blithfieldが1330年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリスフィールドで生まれた時，父Richard de Blithfieldは37歳，母Cecilyは33歳であった。約1357年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブリスフィールドでSir Ralph Bagot of Blithfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Blithfield(이)가 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블리스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Blithfield(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecily(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1357년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블리스필드에서 Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Blithfield nasceu em 1330, em Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Blithfield, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecily, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield aproximadamente 1357, em Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1367, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ro.Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, England: Blithfield Hall, Staffordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Blithfield родилась в 1330 г. в местности блитфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Blithfield было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield около 1357 г. в местности блитфиелд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1367 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

Se casó con Sir Ralph Bagot of Blithfield aproximadamente 1357, en Blithfield, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1367, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
